_comment: Routing for the ultracode proxy. KEY = the model id Claude Code sends (the id you put in ultracode_models.json and pick in /model). Copy to ultracode_slots.json and KEEP ONLY what you use. Secrets go in ultracode.env as ${VARS}, never inline. 'upstream' for openai_compat is the base URL from the provider's docs (usually ends in /v1); the proxy appends /chat/completions. The model ids below were accurate at time of writing - check your provider's docs and adjust.

_fields.type: omit = Anthropic passthrough; 'openai_compat' = any OpenAI Chat Completions backend (with tool-calling); 'codex_oauth' = GPT-5.5 via a ChatGPT/Codex login.
_fields.model: the id the backend expects (not the claude-* alias).
_fields.upstream: openai_compat: OpenAI base URL (ends in /v1). passthrough: base that the inbound path is appended to.
_fields.headers: optional dict of extra request headers (values support ${VARS}); e.g. a User-Agent some gateways require.
_fields.label: human note; never sent.

claude-opus-4-8.label: Real Anthropic Opus 4.8 with full UltraCode (your own Claude login).

claude-gpt-5.5-codex.label: GPT-5.5 via a ChatGPT/Codex login (run `codex login` once; no API key).

claude-step-flash.label: StepFun Step Flash. Set 'model' to the id your plan exposes (e.g. step-3.5-flash).

claude-ollama-cloud.label: Ollama Cloud plan. Swap 'model' for any cloud model (e.g. deepseek-v4-pro, qwen3-coder, gpt-oss:120b).

claude-opencode.label: OpenCode Go plan (Anthropic-native). Set 'model' to the id your OpenCode plan exposes.

claude-openrouter.label: Any OpenRouter model - swap 'model' for any slug OpenRouter lists.

claude-local.label: A local OpenAI-compatible server (Ollama :11434, llama.cpp :8080, LM Studio :1234). The key is usually ignored.
